entries.title: Alternate Realities: see what your library could look like
entries.body: A new 'Alternate Realities' panel in the Stats tab lets you ask 'what if?' questions about your gaming history. See how much money you'd have saved by skipping games you barely played, adjust a slider to filter by minimum rating, discover your actual discount savings, and project how playing just 1 extra hour a day changes your cost-per-hour. Five interactive scenarios, all driven by your real data.

entries.title: Search your library instantly
entries.body: A search bar now lives at the top of the Games tab. Type a game name, genre, or platform and your list narrows in real time. Works great when you have a big library and just want to find that one game quickly.

entries.title: Updates live here now
entries.body: This is the new What's New panel. When the app changes, you'll see a friendly summary here so you always know what's different.
